description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this navy blue laptop bag from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accommodate everything you need, while you strut around looking super funky!Height: 47 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 16 cmMade of polyester for enhanced durabilityTwo roomy compartments with insert pockets and zippered pocketsBrand name appliqued on the frontHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useOne mesh bottle holder on the left sideCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
